changelog:
- Audio Streaming: Fixed silent capture issues on fast reconnect by resolving PCM/WebRTC handover race conditions.
- Media Compatibility: Implemented transient audio focus to prevent YouTube and Facebook from pausing during mic monitoring.
- Camera Reliability: Fixed black image issues by prioritizing logical multi-cameras and flushing residual preview frames before capture.
- Audio Pickup: Enhanced source rotation to reliably find a working mic path on aggressive OEM ROMs.
